grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Covers client care, case management, risk management, AML compliance, training, and IT security

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Lists specific evidence like training records, complaints handling records, client care letters, file review checklists

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: No mention of SRO role or requirement anywhere in the response

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: No specific reference to protocol compliance monitoring requirements

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: Mentions IT security and data protection measures under policies & procedures

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: Covers file reviews, supervisor reviews for fee earners, and supervision arrangements
